LightningComponentBundle.description: Merges 2-5 Salesforce reports. JOIN mode combines horizontally, UNION mode stacks vertically with support for 2 dimensions.

property.name: report3Id
property.label: Report 3 ID
property.description: The ID of the third report (optional)

property.name: report4Id
property.label: Report 4 ID
property.description: The ID of the fourth report (optional)

property.name: report5Id
property.label: Report 5 ID
property.description: The ID of the fifth report (optional)

property.name: mergeMode
property.label: Merge Mode
property.description: OUTER_JOIN: horizontal, all keys. INNER_JOIN: horizontal, matching keys only. UNION: vertical stack.

property.name: visibilityScope
property.label: Data Visibility
property.description: ALL: use report defaults. MY_RECORDS: only current user's data. MY_TEAM: user + subordinates.

property.name: dimensionConstantsJson
property.label: Dimension Constants (JSON)
property.description: For UNION when reports have different dimension counts. Format: {"1": "Total", "2": "Combined"}

property.name: showSubtotals
property.label: Show Subtotals
property.description: Add subtotal row after each primary group (UNION with 2 dims)

property.name: fillMissingCategories
property.label: Fill Missing Categories
property.description: Fill all category combinations with zeros (UNION mode)

property.name: sortGroupsBy
property.label: Sort Groups By Column
property.description: Column key to sort groups by aggregate (e.g., merged_Record_Count). Keeps groups together.

property.name: columnAliasesJson
property.label: Column Aliases (JSON)
property.description: Rename columns (applied client-side). By label: {"Sum of Funded Amount":"Funded Amount"}. By index: {"2":"Alias"} for column 2.

property.name: calculatedFieldsJson
property.label: Calculated Fields (JSON)
property.description: Add computed columns (JOIN mode only). Format: [{"label":"Diff","formula":"r1_RowCount - r2_RowCount"}]

property.name: tierLookupsJson
property.label: Tier Lookups (JSON)
property.description: Tier-based rate lookups (usable in formulas). Format: [{"label":"Rate","inputFormula":"Funded / Approved","nullWhenZero":true,"tiers":[{"min":0.335,"value":0.13},{"value":0.04}]}]

property.name: missingValueAsZero
property.label: Show Missing as Zero
property.description: Display missing values as 0 instead of —

property.name: sortBy
property.label: Sort By Column Index
property.description: Column index for initial sort: 0=key, 1+=value columns. Use Debug Mode to see column order. Click header to sort at runtime.

property.name: debugMode
property.label: 🔧 Debug Mode
property.description: Shows raw data, configuration, and recommendations instead of grid

property.name: refreshKey
property.label: 🔄 Refresh Key
property.description: Change this value to force refresh in App Builder edit mode
